title: FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP - 211info
text: MADRAS CHILD WELFARE FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits, trains, and supports foster and kinship caregivers. Provides resources and connections, including support groups for resource providers, adoptive parents, and kinship caregivers. 189 NE Cypress Street Suite 104 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: ODHS resource parents, adoptive parents, and kinship providers who are certified with ODHS Child Welfare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays (503) 447-6207 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 447-6207 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Caregiver Training * Foster Parents Foster Parent/Family Recruitment In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents In Person Support Groups * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD WELFARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS CHILD WELFARE
